title: Identify the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD)
text: To simplify a fraction, find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of the numerator and the denominator. What is the GCD of $$45$$ and 60?

title: Divide by the GCD
text: Once you have the GCD, divide both the numerator and the denominator by this number. What do you get when you divide $$45$$ and $$60$$ by their GCD?

title: Check Your Work
text: After simplifying, check if the numerator and the denominator have any common factors left. If they don't, the fraction is in its simplest form.
